results.rendered_html:
āpaṇika (von āpaṇa)  Uṇ. 2,46  (āpa˚).
1〉 adj. mit dem Markte in Verbindung stehend, = āpaṇādagataḥ  P. 4,3,75 , Sch. = āpaṇasya dharmyam 4,4,47 , Sch.
— 2〉 m.
a〉 Handelsmann  AK. 2,9,79 .  H. 867 .
— b〉 das Pachtgeld für einen Markt  P. 4,4,50 , Sch.

results.rendered_html:
āpaṇika a. [āpaṇādāgataḥ ṭhak]
1 Relating to traffic, market &c., mercantile.
2 Got from the market (as duties).
— kaḥ
1 A shop-keeper, merchant, dealer.
2 A tax on market shops.
3 Assize, market-rate.
